title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-11
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Greenhouse metrics refreshed
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the code-plants and updating the community app metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and greenhouse health checks in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app showcase reflects the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: The monitor robot acting as an automated gardener, watering code-plants in a greenhouse while Polly the bee checks them off on a clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering a row of glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes.
